body:
Docstring did not match the actual constructor. They do now.

@suyashbire1 Do you think `clobber` should be true or false by default?

Also updated the docstring to make it clear that `outputs` needs to be a `Dict` for now.

Resolves #553

labels.description: Even a perfect program still has bugs
labels.name: bug 🐞

title: Update `NetCDFOutputWriter` docstring and clobber default

body:
This PR adds a general-purpose batched tridiagonal solver which we can use for vertically stretched pressure solves, implicit vertical diffusion, sub-stepping of atmospheric acoustic waves, etc.

The coefficients and right-hand-side can be specified as a 1D array (shared by all the tridiagonal systems), a 3D array (different for each tridiagonal system), or a function (coefficient is calculated on the fly).

Should probably add proper docstrings before merging.

The vertically stretched pressure solver (PR #306) can be built on top of this batched tridiagonal solver.

labels.description: So things don't blow up and boil the lobsters alive
labels.name: numerics 🧮

title: General-purpose batched tridiagonal solver

I also added some basic tests.
title: Support for applying channel boundary conditions
